tracks.meaning: to become skilled or proficient at something through practice and experience
a person who is highly skilled and knowledgeable in a particular field or profession
a person who holds an academic degree or diploma, especially in a university context
a skilled musician or conductor with extensive training and experience
the captain or commanding officer of a merchant ship
a senior commissioned officer ranking above captain in various armed forces
a skilled performer or teacher in stage acting and drama
to mentally visualize and rehearse success in an activity before performing it
a person who is exceptionally skilled, accomplished, or dominant in their field
to teach or train someone in a skill or subject
the original or primary copy of a digital file or recording from which copies are made
the original document or artwork from which copies or reproductions are created
a control device or unit that operates other devices in a system or network
the main or principal record or version of data or information
